description_long: This is a medium-sized, octagonal white marble obelisk set atop a two-tiered, stepped base, also made of marble. The central shaft features intricately carved relief panels on each face, depicting various scenes, possibly historical or allegorical, with figures and ships. The marble surface is smooth and polished, with subtle veining visible throughout, giving it a refined and elegant appearance. The base is bordered by a ring of small, rectangular stone tiles arranged in an octagonal pattern, providing a visual transition between the obelisk and the ground. The overall design is classical, evoking a sense of monumentality and commemoration. There are no visible inscriptions, but the detailed reliefs serve as the primary decorative elements.
description: A white marble octagonal obelisk with carved relief panels on each face, set on a stepped base and surrounded by an octagonal tiled platform. The surface is smooth and polished, with classical decorative motifs.
description_view_0: This view shows the obelisk's front face with a prominent relief panel depicting a group of figures and architectural elements, and the stepped marble base with the octagonal tiled platform clearly visible.
description_view_1: This angle highlights a different relief panel featuring seated and standing figures, as well as the clean, polished marble surfaces and the geometric base structure.
description_view_2: This side displays reliefs of ships and maritime scenes, emphasizing the detailed carvings and the continuity of the octagonal shaft and base.
description_view_3: This view reveals another relief panel with a ship and a partial view of the front panel, showing the transition between different narrative scenes and the consistent stepped base.
attribute_ornamentation: The obelisk features detailed relief carvings on each face of the central shaft, depicting scenes with human figures and ships in a classical style.
attribute_base_design: The base consists of two octagonal, stepped marble platforms, with the lower platform bordered by a ring of small, rectangular stone tiles arranged in an octagonal pattern. The design is geometric and classical, providing stability and visual prominence.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is flat and octagonal, matching the shaft's cross-section, with a smooth, polished finish and no additional decoration.
attribute_surrounding_features: The obelisk is immediately surrounded by an octagonal tiled platform made of small, light beige stone tiles.
